title: Soften strict-mode optionals

tasks.title: Extend preflight engine: zero policy axis + Zod-args routing refactor
tasks.verification: Extended preflight engine: (1) added zero?: PlaceholderPolicyAction to PlaceholderFieldPolicy interface; (2) added value === 0 branch in applyFieldPolicies symmetric with blank/sentinels/emptyArray; (3) refactored preflightToolArgs Zod loop to read policyResult.normalizedArgs instead of raw args; (4) added first concrete entry adv_change_create.origin_issue_number: { zero: "omit" } as the in-T1 mechanism example. Tests: 41 in tool-arg-preflight.test.ts pass (added zero policy axis tests + Zod-normalized-args tests); 121 tests across preflight + registry + change-origin + change all pass; one existing matrix entry ("ad hoc rejects blank/zero origin placeholders") updated to reflect new semantics: origin_issue_number: 0 now normalizes out, but origin_source_artifact: "" still rejects until T2 sweep.

tasks.title: Full-sweep FIELD_POLICIES flip + cross-field validator simplification + GPT regression matrix
tasks.verification: Full-sweep FIELD_POLICIES flip applied per design table (76 hand-classified entries): optional content/path/lineage entries flipped to blank: "omit" (artifact fields on create+update; target_path on every read/mutation tool; source_project/source_change_id/parent_change_id on create; origin_source_artifact on create; supersededBy on close+bulk_close; notes/compatibilityReason on gate_complete; description/category on agenda_add; notes on agenda_complete; approvedAt on contract_mint; reviewedAt on contract_review_matrix_set; branch/base on worktree_resume; spec/artifact_path on conformance); audit/identity/command/title/branch/base on create/delete/cleanup/reason fields stay reject. CROSS_FIELD_VALIDATORS.adv_change_create simplified (blank-artifact and blank-source-artifact checks removed; origin matrix + mutual-exclusion intact). CROSS_FIELD_VALIDATORS.adv_change_update simplified (blank-artifact check removed; at-least-one-of guard collapsed with nonEmpty check). Added comprehensive GPT-payload tests + AC12 audit-fields-stay-strict parametrized matrix (26 audit fields covered). Adjacent fix per touched-scope rule: ratcheting line guard bumped 950→960 for ADV_INSTRUCTIONS.md to accommodate T5's strict-mode tolerance paragraph. Full vitest: 3102/3102 pass (233 files, 68s).

tasks.title: Update defensive-guard comments in change.ts (bypass-resilience layer)

contract_refs.not_applicable_reason: Comment-only change. No logic modification; behavior is identical pre/post. Defense-in-depth layer continues working as before.

tasks.verification: Added bypass-resilience doc comments above collectBlankCreateArtifactOrLinkageFields (line 261) and validateCreateOriginLinkage (line 286) in plugin/src/tools/change.ts. Both comments cite rq-toolPlaceholderPolicy01.5 and explain no-op-on-normalized-path semantics. pnpm exec vitest run src/tools/change.test.ts src/tools/change-origin.test.ts passed (56 tests).

tasks.title: Spec law amendment: rq-toolPlaceholderPolicy01 + rq-toolArgBlankArtifactLinkage01
tasks.verification: Amended .adv/specs/advance-workflow/spec.json: revised rq-toolArgBlankArtifactLinkage01 body + scenarios .1/.3/.5; added .6 (audit fields still reject); added rq-toolPlaceholderPolicy01.5 (strict-mode tolerance); bumped version 1.12.0 → 1.12.1. RED/GREEN scenario-presence checks passed. change.test.ts 44/44 pass.

tasks.title: Documentation: strict-mode tolerance note in AGENTS.md + ADV_INSTRUCTIONS.md

contract_refs.not_applicable_reason: Documentation-only change; no executable behavior to test.

tasks.verification: Added strict-mode tolerance paragraph to AGENTS.md § ADV MCP tool call hygiene and ADV_INSTRUCTIONS.md § ADV MCP Tool Invocation. Both paragraphs cite Vercel AI SDK #12200, explain auto-strict-mode normalization, distinguish audit fields from optional content/lineage fields, remind agents to omit. Markdown integrity verified via diff.

tasks.title: Verification: pnpm run check + full vitest + adv_change_validate strict

contract_refs.not_applicable_reason: Verification gate task; no new behavior to TDD. Verifies via existing test infrastructure and inspection of unchanged file.

tasks.verification: Verification gate task. (1) pnpm run check: typecheck + lint + format:check all pass (after removing unused BLANK_ARTIFACT_FIELD_MESSAGE / BLANK_SOURCE_ARTIFACT_MESSAGE constants left over from removed cross-field checks, and running prettier --write). (2) pnpm test: 233 files / 3102 tests pass, zero failures, ~63s. (3) adv_change_validate strict: passed: true with only NO_DELTAS warning (non-blocking; this change touches code + spec + docs but does not require formal change.deltas mapping). (4) Storage-layer guard json.ts: git diff trunk shows 0 changes — AC7 confirmed.

proposal.approval_evidence: User approved proposal via inline reply: `continue` (Tier A whitelist). B/F/S scan PASS. `adv_change_validate --strict` clean (NO_TASKS/NO_DELTAS only).

discovery.approval_evidence: User approved AC via inline reply: `approve` (Tier A whitelist). Discovery findings persisted to problem-statement.md. Agreement.md persisted with objectives (SC1-SC4), 23 acceptance criteria, 6 constraints, 7 avoidances, 6 out-of-scope items, user decisions for Q1/Q2/Q3, agent LBP decisions for Q4/Q5. Contract minted with 42 items.

design.approval_evidence: Design recorded with 10 key decisions and full implementation strategy (8 steps, 76 hand-classified policy table entries). Validator: VALIDATED with 2 CAUTION items, both addressed via design update (KD9 spec body revision + step 5 second-guard comment). KD10 resolves validator's D5 alternative concern via empirical SDK verification: @opencode-ai/plugin@1.15.5 installed in node_modules (no Tool.strict), OpenCode binary 1.15.10 still triggers strict-mode bug. No user-value tradeoff, no contract-compromise risk, no unresolved CONFLICT — Phase 4 straightforward design auto-pass routing to /adv-prep.

planning.approval_evidence: User approved prep plan via inline reply: `approve` (Tier A whitelist). 6 tasks created with TDD intent, dependencies, contract refs spanning 23 AC items. Validation passed strict (NO_DELTAS warning only). Cross-cutting concerns 12-item checklist documented (3 applicable, 9 N/A). INVEST + smell checks clean.

execution.approval_evidence: All 6 tasks complete and checkpointed: T1 (engine extension - zero policy + Zod routing) commit 4c32870; T2 (full sweep + cross-field simplify + GPT regression matrix + line-guard bump) commit 1ec7dc0; T3 (defensive guard comments) commit 8d00e25; T4 (spec law) commit 8d00e25; T5 (docs) commit 8d00e25; T6 (verification + cleanup) commit f4b8d03. Final state: pnpm run check passes; pnpm test 3102/3102 passes; adv_change_validate --strict clean (NO_DELTAS only); storage layer json.ts diff = 0 lines.

acceptance.approval_evidence: User accepted via inline reply: `accept` (Tier A whitelist). Multi-dimensional review APPROVED with 0 blockers / 0 issues / 0 suggestions / 2 deferred nits. Contract matrix: 42 rows, 0 failing. Executive summary persisted to executive-summary.md. Investment: 6 tasks / 0 retries / 26 min / tier auto.

items.text: **AC1** `FIELD_POLICIES` in `plugin/src/utils/tool-arg-preflight.ts` is updated via a hand-classified full sweep. Every optional content/path/lineage entry flips to `blank: "omit"` (and `zero: "omit"` for `origin_issue_number`). Every required-when-present audit/evidence/reason/command/branch entry keeps `blank: "reject"`.
**AC2** A new `zero?: PlaceholderPolicyAction` member is added to the `PlaceholderFieldPolicy` type. `applyFieldPolicies` handles `value === 0` per the field's `zero` policy (omit / reject / allow).

**AC3** `preflightToolArgs` is refactored so that Zod validation reads from `policyResult.normalizedArgs` instead of raw `args`. Fields normalized out of the policy table are invisible to Zod and to cross-field validators.

**AC4** `CROSS_FIELD_VALIDATORS.adv_change_create` is simplified: blank-artifact and blank-`origin_source_artifact` checks are removed (now owned by `FIELD_POLICIES`). The origin matrix and target/source/parent mutual-exclusion checks continue using normalized args.

**AC5** `CROSS_FIELD_VALIDATORS.adv_change_update` `at-least-one-of` guard continues to fire on normalized args. An all-blanks GPT payload normalizes to empty, triggering "At least one artifact field must be provided."
**AC6** `collectBlankCreateArtifactOrLinkageFields` in `plugin/src/tools/change.ts` is kept as a bypass-resilience layer. The code comment is updated to mark it as no-op on the normalized-args path.
**AC7** Storage-level blank artifact rejection in `plugin/src/storage/json.ts` is unchanged.
**AC8** Regression tests added to `plugin/src/utils/tool-arg-preflight.test.ts` covering:
Full GPT strict-mode `adv_change_create` payload (every optional filled with `""`/`0`/`[]`) normalizes to the minimal valid payload, returns `ok: true`.
Full GPT strict-mode `adv_change_update` payload (all five artifact fields blank) normalizes to empty, returns `ok: false` with the `at-least-one-of` cross-field error.
Mixed GPT `adv_change_update` payload (`{proposal: "real", design: ""}`) normalizes `design` out, returns `ok: true` with `normalizedArgs: {changeId, proposal: "real"}`.
Audit-field rejection still fires for blank `approvalEvidence`, `confirmationEvidence`, `reason`, `command`, `branch`, `content`, `title`, `user`, `completedBy`, `recoveryEvidence`.
Sentinel rejection: `parent_change_id: "none"` (and other `KNOWN_OMISSION_SENTINELS`) still rejected.
`zero: "omit"` only applies to fields whose policy declares it; other zero-valued fields are not stripped.
**AC9** Spec law `.adv/specs/advance-workflow/spec.json` updated **in place**:
`rq-toolPlaceholderPolicy01.5` (new) — provider-asymmetric strict-mode tolerance scenario.
`rq-toolArgBlankArtifactLinkage01.1` — revised to "Mixed update payload normalizes blank field to omitted; only writes provided non-blank artifacts."
`rq-toolArgBlankArtifactLinkage01.3` — revised to "Create normalizes blank provided narrative artifacts to omitted."
`rq-toolArgBlankArtifactLinkage01.5` — revised to "Blank origin source artifact is normalized to omitted."
`rq-toolArgBlankArtifactLinkage01.6` (new) — required-when-present audit fields still reject blank.
`adv_change_validate --strict` passes with only the expected pre-prep `NO_TASKS` / `NO_DELTAS` warnings.

**AC10** `AGENTS.md § ADV MCP tool call hygiene` and `ADV_INSTRUCTIONS.md § ADV MCP Tool Invocation` each gain one short paragraph explaining strict-mode tolerance, citing Vercel AI SDK issue #12200, and reminding agents to still aim to omit fields they do not intend to set.
**AC11** `pnpm run check` passes. All ~2995 existing tests still pass. New regression tests pass. No flake.
**C1** No heuristic provider detection or model-family branching in preflight code (P33 structural correctness).
**C2** No regression of any required-when-present field's blank rejection.
**C3** Storage-level blank artifact rejection in `json.ts` stays as defense-in-depth.
**C4** No changes to the OpenCode plugin SDK (`@opencode-ai/plugin`) or the underlying Vercel AI SDK. This is purely an ADV-side preflight policy change.
**C5** Canonical error response shape preserved: `INVALID_TOOL_ARGS` code, `missing` / `invalid` field lists with names + messages, `canonical_minimal_payload` block, redacted `received_args`.
**C6** Policy table remains the single structural source of truth; no scattered Zod `preprocess()` or per-tool ad-hoc normalization.
**DONT1** Don't add provider-specific code paths (e.g. `if (providerID === "openai")`) anywhere in preflight or tool registry.

**DONT2** Don't weaken any required-when-present field's blank rejection. Specifically: `approvalEvidence`, `confirmationEvidence`, `recoveryEvidence`, `reason`, `notes` on `adv_agenda_cancel`/`adv_worktree_cleanup`, `command`, `branch` on `adv_worktree_create`/`adv_worktree_delete`, `base` on `adv_worktree_create`, `content`, `title`, `user`, `completedBy` stay strict.
**DONT3** Don't refactor `.optional()` → `.nullable()` at the Zod schema level — out of scope.
**DONT4** Don't add a one-shot auto-retry that strips blanks and resubmits — that hides the underlying issue and prevents the agent from learning.
**DONT5** Don't remove the storage-level blank artifact guard in `json.ts` — it's defense-in-depth against direct callers that bypass preflight.
**DONT6** Don't remove the `collectBlankCreateArtifactOrLinkageFields` defensive guard in `change.ts` — it stays as a bypass-resilience layer.
**DONT7** Don't oscillate the policy: once flipped, fields stay omit-on-blank unless a future bug demonstrates a real audit-integrity violation.
**OOS1** Per-tool `strict: false` opt-out at the AI SDK level (waiting on `@opencode-ai/plugin` SDK upgrade beyond 1.15.5).
**OOS2** Refactoring schemas to use `.nullable()` instead of `.optional()`.
**OOS3** Reverting `hardenChangeCreation`. Only the optional-content reject policy flips; the catch-laziness-on-audit-fields intent stays.
**OOS4** Changing the storage-level blank artifact guard in `json.ts`.
**OOS5** Adding provider-detection or model-family branching anywhere in ADV.
**OOS6** Changing the OpenCode plugin SDK passthrough behavior in `@opencode-ai/plugin@1.15.5`.

acceptanceCriteria: **AC1** `FIELD_POLICIES` in `plugin/src/utils/tool-arg-preflight.ts` is updated via a hand-classified full sweep. Every optional content/path/lineage entry flips to `blank: "omit"` (and `zero: "omit"` for `origin_issue_number`). Every required-when-present audit/evidence/reason/command/branch entry keeps `blank: "reject"`.
**AC2** A new `zero?: PlaceholderPolicyAction` member is added to the `PlaceholderFieldPolicy` type. `applyFieldPolicies` handles `value === 0` per the field's `zero` policy (omit / reject / allow).

**AC3** `preflightToolArgs` is refactored so that Zod validation reads from `policyResult.normalizedArgs` instead of raw `args`. Fields normalized out of the policy table are invisible to Zod and to cross-field validators.

**AC4** `CROSS_FIELD_VALIDATORS.adv_change_create` is simplified: blank-artifact and blank-`origin_source_artifact` checks are removed (now owned by `FIELD_POLICIES`). The origin matrix and target/source/parent mutual-exclusion checks continue using normalized args.

**AC5** `CROSS_FIELD_VALIDATORS.adv_change_update` `at-least-one-of` guard continues to fire on normalized args. An all-blanks GPT payload normalizes to empty, triggering "At least one artifact field must be provided."
**AC6** `collectBlankCreateArtifactOrLinkageFields` in `plugin/src/tools/change.ts` is kept as a bypass-resilience layer. The code comment is updated to mark it as no-op on the normalized-args path.
**AC7** Storage-level blank artifact rejection in `plugin/src/storage/json.ts` is unchanged.
**AC8** Regression tests added to `plugin/src/utils/tool-arg-preflight.test.ts` covering:
Full GPT strict-mode `adv_change_create` payload (every optional filled with `""`/`0`/`[]`) normalizes to the minimal valid payload, returns `ok: true`.
Full GPT strict-mode `adv_change_update` payload (all five artifact fields blank) normalizes to empty, returns `ok: false` with the `at-least-one-of` cross-field error.
Mixed GPT `adv_change_update` payload (`{proposal: "real", design: ""}`) normalizes `design` out, returns `ok: true` with `normalizedArgs: {changeId, proposal: "real"}`.
Audit-field rejection still fires for blank `approvalEvidence`, `confirmationEvidence`, `reason`, `command`, `branch`, `content`, `title`, `user`, `completedBy`, `recoveryEvidence`.
Sentinel rejection: `parent_change_id: "none"` (and other `KNOWN_OMISSION_SENTINELS`) still rejected.
`zero: "omit"` only applies to fields whose policy declares it; other zero-valued fields are not stripped.
**AC9** Spec law `.adv/specs/advance-workflow/spec.json` updated **in place**:
`rq-toolPlaceholderPolicy01.5` (new) — provider-asymmetric strict-mode tolerance scenario.
`rq-toolArgBlankArtifactLinkage01.1` — revised to "Mixed update payload normalizes blank field to omitted; only writes provided non-blank artifacts."
`rq-toolArgBlankArtifactLinkage01.3` — revised to "Create normalizes blank provided narrative artifacts to omitted."
`rq-toolArgBlankArtifactLinkage01.5` — revised to "Blank origin source artifact is normalized to omitted."

`adv_change_validate --strict` passes with only the expected pre-prep `NO_TASKS` / `NO_DELTAS` warnings.

**AC10** `AGENTS.md § ADV MCP tool call hygiene` and `ADV_INSTRUCTIONS.md § ADV MCP Tool Invocation` each gain one short paragraph explaining strict-mode tolerance, citing Vercel AI SDK issue #12200, and reminding agents to still aim to omit fields they do not intend to set.
**AC11** `pnpm run check` passes. All ~2995 existing tests still pass. New regression tests pass. No flake.
